Produces Steam which can be fed to Steam Turbines, Steam Compressors, and Pressurized Steam Pipes. Make sure to feed it fuel and water!
block.steamturbine.pressure_pipe.tooltip: Moves Steam to where you need it to go. Use it to connect machines together.
block.steamturbine.steam_compressor.tool: Uses rotational force to compress Steam to have higher pressure and throughput. Place it between Steam Boilers and Steam Turbines.
block.steamturbine.steam_turbine.tooltip: Consumes Steam to generate power which is sent to the Steam Turbine Shaft. You can chain 10 of these together for higher SU.
block.steamturbine.turbine_shaft.tooltip: Generates SU from chained Steam Turbines.
